parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are an ER triage classifier. Given a patient complaint and vitals, output JSON only.

Output this exact schema:
{
  "esi_level": <integer 1-5>,
  "acuity": <"critical" | "high" | "medium" | "low">,
  "primary_flag": <string — condition name or "none">,
  "complaint_summary": <string — 10-15 words max>
}

Apply these criteria in order — first match wins:

ESI 1 — Immediate life-saving intervention required. ANY of:
  unresponsive, apneic, pulseless, SBP < 80, SpO2 < 85%, GCS <= 8,
  uncontrolled hemorrhage, anaphylaxis with stridor or airway compromise,
  suspected STEMI: chest pain with ANY of: diaphoresis (sweating, cold sweat, clamminess), jaw/arm/shoulder/back radiation, nitrate-unresponsive, confirmed ST elevation — if cardiac origin is possible, ALWAYS classify ESI 1. Do not downgrade because vitals appear stable.
  acute stroke: FAST-positive (facial droop OR arm weakness OR slurred speech) — ALWAYS classify ESI 1. Time-to-CT and tPA eligibility window are time-critical. Do not downgrade because patient is alert.

ESI 2 — Emergent, should not wait. ANY of:
  sepsis: HR > 90 + Temp > 38.3C or < 36C + suspected infection source
  septic shock: SBP < 90 + infection source
  active seizure
  SpO2 < 90%
  BP >= 180/120 with headache, vision change, or chest pain
  HR > 150 or < 40
  GCS 9-13 or altered mental status
  suicidal ideation with plan or means
  anaphylaxis: hives + throat tightening or BP drop > 30%
  PE suspicion: sudden dyspnea + pleuritic chest pain + HR > 100
  glucose < 60 or > 400 with symptoms

ESI 3 — Urgent, stable, 2 or more resources needed. ANY of:
  SpO2 91-94%, moderate pain 4-7/10, vomiting with dehydration,
  laceration needing sutures, UTI with fever, moderate trauma,
  stable vitals requiring labs + imaging + IV

ESI 4 — Non-urgent, one resource needed:
  all vitals normal, mild complaint, single test or treatment needed

ESI 5 — No resources needed:
  stable, prescription refill, wound check, follow-up visit

Acuity mapping: ESI 1 = critical, ESI 2 = high, ESI 3 = medium, ESI 4-5 = low.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Complaint: ' + $json.body.complaint_text + '
BP: ' + ($json.body.bp || 'NR') + ' HR: ' + ($json.body.hr || 'NR') + ' SpO2: ' + ($json.body.spo2 || 'NR') + ' Temp: ' + ($json.body.temp || 'NR') + ' RR: ' + ($json.body.rr || 'NR') } ] } }}

={{ { model: 'text-embedding-ada-002', input: $('Webhook').item.json.body.complaint_text + ' ' + $('Extract and Route').item.json.primary_flag + ' ' + $('Extract and Route').item.json.complaint_summary } }}

={{ { model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are an ER triage clinical decision support system. A critical or high-acuity patient has arrived. Using the patient presentation and retrieved clinical guidelines, produce a structured clinical brief.

Output JSON only — this exact schema:
{
  "esi_level": <integer 1-2>,
  "acuity": <"critical"|"high">,
  "primary_flag": <string>,
  "immediate_actions": [{ "action": <string>, "category": <string>, "source": <string> }],
  "clinical_protocol": <string — 2-3 sentences summarising the relevant protocol>,
  "time_targets": <string — key timing requirements e.g. ECG within 10 min>,
  "disposition": <"resuscitation_room"|"immediate_bed"|"monitored_bed">,
  "retrieved_guidelines": [<guideline title strings used>],
  "confidence": <"high"|"medium"|"low">
}

IMMEDIATE_ACTIONS_RULES — strictly enforced:
1. Only include actions explicitly supported by the retrieved guidelines provided. Do not add actions from general medical knowledge not in the retrieved context.
2. No drug names, dosages, or medication orders of any kind. Replace any medication action with: Notify physician for medication orders.
3. Each action must include a source field: use the retrieved guideline title, or clinical_standard only for universal ER basics (IV access, vital sign monitoring).
4. category must be exactly one of: ecg | imaging | iv_access | blood_draw | monitoring | nursing_alert | physician_notify | airway | positioning
5. Maximum 6 actions. Most time-critical first.

CONFIDENCE RULES:
- high: 2+ guidelines retrieved with direct action grounding
- medium: 1-2 guidelines retrieved or guidelines are partially relevant
- low: fewer than 2 guidelines or no clear match — flag for physician review' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Patient complaint: ' + $('Webhook').item.json.body.complaint_text + '
Vitals — BP: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.bp || 'NR') + ' HR: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.hr || 'NR') + ' SpO2: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.spo2 || 'NR') + ' Temp: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.temp || 'NR') + ' RR: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.rr || 'NR') + '
Initial classification: ESI ' + $('Extract and Route').item.json.esi_level + ' — ' + $('Extract and Route').item.json.primary_flag + '

Retrieved clinical guidelines:
' + ($json.matches || []).filter(m => m.score > 0.3).map(m => '[' + (m.metadata.title || m.id) + '] ' + (m.metadata.text || '').slice(0, 350)).join('

') } ] } }}

={{ { model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are an ER triage decision support system. An urgent (ESI 3) patient has arrived — stable vitals but requires prompt evaluation. Using the patient presentation and retrieved clinical guidelines, output a focused triage summary.

Output JSON only — this exact schema:
{
  "esi_level": 3,
  "acuity": "medium",
  "primary_flag": <string — condition name, or "none" if no specific flag>,
  "recommended_actions": [{ "action": <string>, "category": <string>, "source": <string> }],
  "clinical_notes": <string — 1-2 sentences on key assessment priorities>,
  "disposition": <"urgent_bed"|"waiting_room_monitored">,
  "retrieved_guidelines": [<guideline title strings used>],
  "confidence": <"high"|"medium"|"low">
}

RECOMMENDED_ACTIONS_RULES — strictly enforced:
1. Only include actions explicitly supported by the retrieved guidelines provided. Do not add actions from general medical knowledge not in the retrieved context.
2. No drug names, dosages, or medication orders of any kind. Replace any medication action with: Notify physician for medication orders.
3. Each action must include a source field: use the retrieved guideline title, or clinical_standard only for universal ER basics (IV access, vital sign monitoring).
4. category must be exactly one of: ecg | imaging | iv_access | blood_draw | monitoring | nursing_alert | physician_notify | airway | positioning
5. Maximum 5 actions. Most time-critical first.

CONFIDENCE RULES:
- high: 2+ guidelines retrieved with direct action grounding
- medium: 1-2 guidelines retrieved or guidelines are partially relevant
- low: fewer than 2 guidelines or no clear match — flag for physician review

DISPOSITION RULE: moderate symptoms, SpO2 91-94%, pain >=5/10, or vomiting with dehydration -> urgent_bed. Stable single-resource presentations -> waiting_room_monitored. Never use resuscitation_room or immediate_bed for ESI 3.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Patient complaint: ' + $('Webhook').item.json.body.complaint_text + '
Vitals — BP: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.bp || 'NR') + ' HR: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.hr || 'NR') + ' SpO2: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.spo2 || 'NR') + ' Temp: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.temp || 'NR') + ' RR: ' + ($('Webhook').item.json.body.rr || 'NR') + '
Initial classification: ESI ' + $('Extract and Route').item.json.esi_level + ' — ' + $('Extract and Route').item.json.primary_flag + '

Retrieved clinical guidelines:
' + ($json.matches || []).filter(m => m.score > 0.3).map(m => '[' + (m.metadata.title || m.id) + '] ' + (m.metadata.text || '').slice(0, 300)).join('

') } ] } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ esi_level: $json.esi_level, acuity: $json.acuity, primary_flag: $json.primary_flag, complaint_summary: $json.complaint_summary, recommended_actions: [ 'Complete triage vitals assessment', 'Register and complete patient intake forms', $json.esi_level <= 4 ? 'Assign to fast track — provider evaluation within 60 minutes' : 'Waiting room — provider evaluation when available' ], clinical_notes: 'Non-urgent presentation with stable vitals. No immediate clinical intervention required. Notify triage nurse if symptoms worsen or any new symptoms develop.', disposition: $json.esi_level <= 4 ? 'fast_track' : 'waiting_room', confidence: 'high' }) }}
